texto: It is not the guns or armament Or the money they can pay It's the close co-operation That makes them win the day. It is not the individual Or the army as a whole But the everlastin' teamwork Of every bloomin' soul.
explicacao: Citação de J. Mason Knox sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “It is not the guns or armament Or the money they can pay It's the close co-operation That makes t…” articula reflexao, soldier, armament em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
